content: Multi-tenant SaaS on Postgres: default choice is shared schema with tenant_id (org_id) column on every table + composite indexes led by tenant_id; Postgres Row Level Security as defense-in-depth (set_config('app.current_tenant_id', ..., true) transaction-scoped, safe with PgBouncer transaction pooling). RLS complements — does not replace — verified tenant identity at the API boundary. Hierarchy: organization -> users(roles) -> domain resources all carrying org_id.
